📚 Chapter 3: Additional Resources

📖 Deep Dives from Future of PMM

🔌
What is MCP? The Protocol Reshaping AI Integration
Understanding Model Context Protocol and why it matters for how AI agents discover and interact with enterprise software.
8 min read
 🎯
The Full-Stack Buyer
How AI is creating a new type of enterprise buyer who researches, evaluates, and decides with unprecedented speed.
12 min read
 💡
Prompt Is a Workflow
How prompting has evolved from single queries to structured workflows — and what it means for content design.
6 min read

🛠️ Tools for AI Visibility Testing

🤖
ChatGPT
Test your visibility with and without web browsing enabled.
 🔮
Perplexity
Strong real-time retrieval with visible citations.
 🎭
Claude
Different training corpus — compare responses to ChatGPT.
